title: Advertisement: Recruitment of Chief Climate Action Officer & Other Posts under SC-3 (CITIIS 2.0), Directorate of Urban Local Bodies, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh
TLAKLUI TO SIHPUI ROAD, INDUSTRY PENG, RAMHLUN VENGLAI ATANGA SIHPUI INKAR KAWNG KHAR/BLOCK CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
4615/2025-2026

Aizawl the 27th February, 2026 :Mizoram State Sorkar Notification No.B.12021/10/04-TRP Dt.22.8.2008 leh Section 115 of MV Act, 1988-in thunelhna a pek ang leh Sr. Executive Engineer, PWD, Aizawl Road North Division ngenna angin Pu C. Vanlalvena, Superintendent of Police, Traffic, Aizawl chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

PWD, Aizawl Road North Division, Sub Division-1 chuan District Industry Centre ram, Ramhlun Venglai-ah kawng laih zau hna an thawk dawn a, hnathawh chhungin a hnuaia tarlan ang hian kawngkhar/blocka ni dawn tih mipuite kan inhriattir e.

Kawngpui kharin a huam chin

Kawngpui khar hun tur

Tlaklui to Sihpui Road, Industry peng, Ramhlun Venglai atanga Sihpui inkar

Ni 27.02.2026 (Zirtawpni) atanga hna thawh zawh hma
